type.description:
An open-ended discriminator — a server may register additional
types beyond these three (see `PostTypeHandler` in the developer
docs); treat an unrecognized value as a plain update. `content`
stays the universal human-readable field for every type (a
poll's question, for instance); type-specific configuration
lives in `typeData` instead.

typeData.description:
Type-specific configuration, `null` for `UPDATE`/`MILESTONE`. For
`POLL`: `{ options: [{ id, text }], closesAt }` — the stored
options (immutable after creation) and optional ISO 8601 close
time. Not present on the response to `POST /api/posts` or
`PATCH /api/posts/{id}` beyond what you sent — read the poll's
live vote tallies from `poll` below instead.

allOf.description:
The enriched, read-time view of a `POLL` post's `typeData` — computed
fresh on every read, never stored as-is. Options and vote counts are
visible to every group member whether or not they've voted; votes are
not anonymous (see `voters` on each option).

voters.description: Everyone who voted for this option, oldest vote first.

myVoteOptionId.description: The option id you voted for, or `null` if you haven't voted.

closed.description: `true` once `closesAt` has passed. Voting a closed poll is rejected.

allOf.title: PostPoll

poll.description:
Present only when `type` is `POLL` — the enriched, read-time view
(vote counts, voters, your own vote). Computed on every read, so
it's absent from `POST /api/posts` and `PATCH /api/posts/{id}`
responses (fetch the post again, e.g. via `GET /api/posts/{id}`,
to see it) — the same precedent as `people` below.

uploadedAssetUrls.description: `/uploads/...` or `/api/immich/assets/...` paths — auth-gated, see Uploads & media.

reactions.description: Per-emoji reaction counts; only emojis with at least one reaction appear.
reactions.title: ReactionCounts

recentReactors.description: The three most recent reactors, newest first.

items.description:
A person mapped by an admin and recognized in a post's photos.
If linked to a Famlin user, includes their profile information.

id.description: The unique identifier for this mapping.

provider.description: Which media source this person's face data comes from.

label.description: Human-readable name set by the admin.

userId.description: If linked to a Famlin user, their user id; otherwise `null`.

userName.description: If linked to a Famlin user, their display name; otherwise `null`.

userAvatarUrl.description: If linked to a Famlin user, their avatar URL; otherwise `null`.

items.title: PostPerson

people.description: Admin-mapped media people recognized in this post's photos, empty if none matched.

sharedWithGroups.description:
Present only in responses to the post's **author**, only when the
post was cross-posted (created with 2+ `groupIds`). Lists every
group the post was shared with, including this response's own
`group`. Other members never see this field or otherwise learn a
post was cross-posted — each group's copy looks like an ordinary,
single-group post to them.

nextCursor.description: Pass back as `?cursor=` for the next page; `null` on the last page.

401.description: Missing, invalid, expired, or revoked credential
